arrays.feature_names: Column names aligned to X_all columns.
arrays.sample_ids: Sample IDs aligned to X_all rows.
arrays.sample_splits: train/test split label aligned to X_all rows.
arrays.sample_types: curated_pathway or negative type aligned to X_all rows.
arrays.selected_go: GO terms selected using the training split only.
arrays.test_idx: Row indices used for held-out testing.
